title: Minecraft:Thundering
description: Adds new structures and enchantments to the game
body:
Minecraft:Thundering adds several new structures and enchantments only obtainable through said structures into Minecraft, encouraging adventure. Most of these took heavy (if not complete) inspiration from Minecraft Dungeons, and the primary enchantments (thundering, leeching, poison cloud) function nearly identically. This datapack/mod also implements a couple combat-related crafting recipes, including the notch apple recipe and blocking-swords (via shield + sword in crafting grid).

Enchantments list:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Poison Cloud - Creates a poison cloud on melee attack, stacking in power with each level. But watch out; you can get poisoned, too!

-Weakening - Similar to Poison Cloud, this attack creates a cloud. Only this one weakens whoever stands in it rather than poisoning them.

-Leeching - Heals you on melee attack landed, stacking with each level.

-Thundering - Summons lightning bolts on melee attack, stacking number of bolts on nearby entities with each level. But be careful not to lightning yourself or your pets/allies!

-Thunder Aura - Brings a storm on the horizon. Perfect for aura farming AND using tridents.

-Mark of the Ninja - put it on any piece of armor and when you get down to 3 hunger, you can enjoy super speed.

</details>

Structures list:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Glowstone Tower

-Old Plains / Desert Village (from pre-1.14)

-Ziggurat

-Illager Ship

-Abandoned base

-A new type of village

-A special desert temple (I wonder what's buried inside!)

-Temples for different biomes

-Shattered Sword

</details>

There are also two secret recipes-- but I'll leave those up to you to discover. (If you're using the datapack version, also put it in your resourcepacks for one of these to look pretty)
